skinparam classMethodSpacing 0

class User {
    String userName
    String password
}

class Tenant {
    String name
}

class Cloud {
    String endpoint
}

class Api {
    String driver
}

class CloudCredential {
    String userName
    String secret
}

class Resource {
    String id
    String name
}

class Image {
    String id
    String name
}

class Hardware {
    String id
    String name
    int cores
    int ram
    int disk
}

class Location {
    String id
    String name
    boolean isAssignable
}

class OperatingSystem {
}

class HardwareOffer {
}

class GeoLocation {
}

class LocationScope {
    REGION,
    ZONE,
    HOST
}

note top of User as "C"
note top of Tenant as "C"
note top of Cloud as "C"
note top of Api as "C"
note top of CloudCredential as "C"
note top of Resource as "A"
note top of Image as "C"
note top of Hardware as "C"
note top of Location as "C"
note top of OperatingSystem as "C"
note top of HardwareOffer as "C"
note top of GeoLocation as "C"
note top of LocationScope as "E"

@enduml
